title: Autototem detector
description: Client side autototem detector thats somewhat accurate
body:
# Totem Speed

A lightweight Fabric client mod that shows **how fast players switch to a totem**, adds a **personal totem‑speed HUD**, a **hotbar alert**, and **session/all‑time stats**.

## ✅ Features
![Example Chat Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CvkgZipM/images/0b4641497e86b583904e1b84d15bb7630ffb1369.png)
- **Chat message** when a nearby player swaps to a totem 
- **Autototem detection** with confidence %-
- **Custom chat format** with placeholders
- **Per‑placeholder text colors**
- **HUD icon** showing **your own totem swap speed**
- **Drag + resize HUD** in a dedicated editor screen
- **Hotbar alert**: “`{name} is autototeming`” (fully customizable)
- **Stats tab** with session/all‑time totals + averages
- **Configurable radius**, autototem threshold, and max‑ms filter
- **Reset session/all‑time** stats (all‑time also resets session)
  
## 📌 Chat Format Placeholders
Use these inside the chat format setting:

- `{name}` → player name  
- `{ms}` → swap speed in milliseconds  
- `{autototem}` → yes / no  
- `{confidence}` → confidence %  

Example: 
`{name} : {ms} ms | {autototem} | {confidence}`

## 🔔 Hotbar Alert Placeholders
Alert format supports:

- `{name}`
- `{autototem}`

Default:  `{name} is {autototem}`

## 🧰 HUD Editor
Go to ModMenu → **HUD** → **Edit HUD position**  
- Drag icon/text to move  
- Scroll to resize  
- Save / Cancel  

Hotbar alert position is also draggable inside the editor.

## ⚙️ Config Highlights
- **Radius**
- **Autototem threshold (ms)**
- **Ignore totem speeds above (ms)**
- **Chat format + colors**
- **HUD enable + color**
- **Hotbar alert enable + format + colors**
- **Stats reset on leave (toggle)**

## 🧪 Requirements
- **Minecraft 1.21.11**
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Fabric API**
- **ModMenu**
- **Cloth Config**

**Huge thanks to [JanCantCode](https://modrinth.com/user/JanCantCode) for making the [original autototem detector](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-totem-detector) (atleast the one i was inspired by)**
